title: Mineageries Plus
description: A mod highlighting the importance of zoos in the conservation of wildlife, bringing light to many lesser-known and misunderstood species.
body:
**Description**
Overview
Mineageries Plus is a brand new Minecraft mod focusing on highlighting the conservation of threatened species and the preservation of biodiversity. From the savanna grasslands to the cherry blossom forests, there is something new for everyone in this new wild adventure! 

**NPCs**
This mod is an early Work in Progress, but some human NPCs are planned. At least one of these will trade you resources for animals to add to your zoos.

**Animals**
What in the world would a zoo mod be without any animals? Currently, this mod adds about 80 new animals to your Minecraft world. As previously mentioned, this mod is still a Work in Progress and there is much to come!
